conversation.text: Can you explain the technical architecture? Where is the data stored and is it GDPR compliant?

yeah of course. all data is stored in Europe and we're fully GDPR compliant. the agent essentially sits between your lead sources and your CRM|||it qualifies the lead in real-time and pushes the data straight to your existing setup. Louis can walk through the exact security and data flow properly on a call if you like?
most of them, including HubSpot, Salesforce, Monday, GHL, and a few others. we've yet to find one we can't plug into if I'm honest|||does your team have a specific one they're using right now?
We use a custom Salesforce instance.
yeah that's standard for teams at your scale. definitely worth a quick 20 min chat with Louis then, he can show you how the integration handles custom fields and objects|||want me to send the link?
Yes, please send the Calendly link.
